name: Anika Rahman
bio: Met during freshman year in Dhaka University. We used to study together every weekend at the library. She is now working as a software engineer at a tech startup.

name: Tariq Hassan
bio: My first manager at my previous company. He taught me so much about professional growth and gave me confidence when I needed it most.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: We grew up on the same street and went to the same school for 10 years. She moved to Bangalore but we try to video call every two weeks.

name: Nabil Chowdhury
bio: We bonded over our shared love of fitness and anime. Currently doing his Masters in CSE. We hit the gym together every Saturday morning.

name: Meera Pillai
bio: We worked together on a huge product launch that kept us both up for weeks. One of the most reliable and warm-hearted people I have ever met.

name: Rafiq Islam
bio: My favourite cousin from my mother's side. We bond over football, street food, and long late-night conversations about life plans.

name: Shreya Gupta
bio: We connected through an online book club and realised we share the same taste in literature and philosophy. She always recommends the best reads.

name: Karim Uddin
bio: Best friend from secondary school. We drifted apart after different universities but try to reconnect whenever we are both in Chittagong.
